heading: Omitted
label: 94 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , providing that the disbursing clerk of the Treasury Department should act in a similar capacity for the Commission, was a proviso repeated in successive appropriation acts but which has not been repeated in recent years.act July 19, 1919, ch. 2441 Stat. 182
